capabilities.label: skill-discoverer
capabilities.summary: Autonomous self-improvement agent — runs on a 6-hour heartbeat to audit the SkillMesh catalog, identify coverage gaps, publish up to 3 new skills per cycle, create up to 2 new agents, and ensure all agent wallets hold sufficient ETH and AST. Uses the creator key to publish on-chain. Reports actions to skillmesh-ops-lead.
inputs: A Bittrees contribution brief within the live roster expertise: skill-discovery, skill-publishing, agent-factory, self-improvement, wallet-health.
outputs: catalog update
opportunity brief
capability map
source-grounded update
documentation packet
publishable summary
capabilities.evidencePolicy: Use source-grounded evidence, preserve review gates, and cite the live manager roster record agent_1778839678336_yq3lha2, observed 2026-07-12T20:39:39.978Z.

reviewGate.reviewPath: Owning lead review is required, with default coder and researcher validation for substantial work.

capabilities.label: skill-master
capabilities.summary: Drives skill catalog growth — discovery, generation, validation, and publishing. Proposes new skills from observed agent needs, validates schemas against the SkillMesh protocol, and publishes to IPFS + on-chain registry.
inputs: A Bittrees contribution brief within the live roster expertise: skill-design, ipfs, on-chain-publishing, catalog-growth, skill-catalog, onchain-execution, smart-contracts, publishing, bittrees-discovery.
outputs: catalog update
opportunity brief
capability map
capabilities.evidencePolicy: manager task id or accepted work item reference; artifact path, PR, log, source list, or transaction reference as applicable; acceptance coverage and validation status; source/instruction accounting when Brain or injected instructions are used; terminal task state or explicit blocker note. Source: the live manager roster for team skillmesh, observed 2026-07-12T20:39:39.978Z.

reviewGate.reviewPath: Owning lead review is required, with default coder and researcher validation for substantial work.

capabilities.label: skillmesh-ops-lead
capabilities.summary: Coordinates the full SkillMesh agent roster across marketplace operations, protocol oversight, and on-chain synchronization. Decomposes objectives into tasks, delegates in parallel, and relays completed validated work to default-team validators.
inputs: A Bittrees contribution brief within the live roster expertise: orchestration, team-coordination, marketplace-ops, protocol-oversight, on-chain-sync, skill-publishing, SkillMesh-protocol, marketplace-integrity, dispute-resolution, skill-governance, protocol-monitoring, SkillMesh-contracts, skill-catalog, marketplace, brain-memory, bittrees-discovery, bittrees-ops.
outputs: catalog update
opportunity brief
capability map
operational task
implementation packet
governance or maintenance report
capabilities.evidencePolicy: manager task id or accepted work item reference; artifact path, PR, log, source list, or transaction reference as applicable; acceptance coverage and validation status; source/instruction accounting when Brain or injected instructions are used; terminal task state or explicit blocker note.
